purpose: Canonical registry for provisioning validation profiles used to validate proxmox-k3s generated clusters before application deployment.
selectionRules: Use PV_C1_PROVIDER_BACKED_BASELINE for the official C1 provider-backed baseline validation workflow.
Use PV_PROVIDER_BACKED_VALIDATION_TEMPLATE only as a runtime generation template for provider-backed campaign variants.
Provisioning validation profiles are concrete executable profiles and are kept under config/provisioning-validation/profiles/.

Generated campaign-variant provisioning-validation profiles must point to the same infrastructure profile, provider binding, kubeconfig and provisioning integration profile as the corresponding generated cycle.

Provisioning-validation profiles are resolved through active cycle profiles or runtime-generated campaign profiles; standalone provider-validation checks are outside the default benchmark-cycle resolution path unless explicitly registered.
description: Canonical registry for concrete provisioning validation profiles and templates used to validate proxmox-k3s generated clusters before application deployment.

runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.rationale: Campaign-variant provisioning validation profiles are generated from the template to validate provider outputs for each infrastructure variant without duplicating static profile files.
runtimeGeneratedProfilePolicy.networkAwareSchedulerToolchainScope: C9 uses runtime-generated provider-backed profiles with proxmox-k3s v1.0.3 add-on support.

prefixPolicy.disambiguationRule: Placement-variation scenario identifiers use the PLC prefix. PV-prefixed identifiers under config/provisioning-validation are provisioning-validation profile identifiers.
